title: nephrodium polycarpon
intro: Nephrodium polycarpon, also known as the Button Fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium polycarpon include relief from congestion, bronchitis, and inflammation, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
